posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 5 of 5 Pending | Tied for 1st with 29 others Farias vs. de AlmeidaJair Farias, TKO, R3Farias should win but he’s kind of awful imo. Sure, he trains at FN and is a huge FW but his skills suck. He is very hittable and doesn’t have a good process either. He should win this fight easily thoughRibeiro vs. PortoAlan Ribeiro, TKOI guess riberio isn’t as bad as his record looks? He lost to Reginaldo years ago and then unfortunately got blasted by Levi, but none of those are aging badly. Porto is a jobber; he’s roided to the gills and has a 3 minute gas tank. Riberio should ko him here, Porto is bad badVentura vs. MirandaArthur Ventura, TKO, R1Love the activity from Ventura, he is a very interesting prospect. He’s only 19, massive for the weight class, and has one of the craziest highlight reels you’ll ever see. All of his sub wins are by different methods and he’s a creative ko artist as well. I love how active he’s staying. He’s only 19 so I imagine he will slow roll himself but given his manager is Martin and he’s racking up crazy wins, dwcs may not be far behind. Very interested to see how Ventura turns out
